body: What's everyone's go-to weeknight dinner recipe? I need something quick and healthy.
Sheet pan chicken with roasted vegetables. Everything in one pan, 30 minutes in the oven.
Stir fry with whatever vegetables are in the fridge. The key is having a good sauce base ready.
What's your sauce base? I can never get stir fry sauce right.
Soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, garlic, ginger, and a bit of cornstarch to thicken. Mix it ahead of time.
